rationale: Gov't Code §1371.001 is a definitions chapter for credit agreements and public securities. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or property tax policy, so no conflict arises from increasing the §11.13(b) exemption.
quote: "Obligation" means a public security as defined by Section 1201.002 or other obligation that may be issued by an issuer and that is expected to be rated, and before delivery is rated, by a nationally recognized rating agency for municipal securities in one of the three highest rating categories for a short-term debt instrument or one of the four highest rating categories for a long-term debt instrument.
_note: Rule text is a pure definitions section with no operative provision tied to homestead exemption amounts. No conflict identified.
